ns0:entry.ns0:title: BookStackApp/BookStack
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BookStackApp/BookStack
Language: php
A platform to create documentation/wiki content built with PHP & Laravel

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PrivateBin/PrivateBin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PrivateBin/PrivateBin
Language: php
A minimalist, open source online pastebin where the server has zero knowledge of pasted data. Data is encrypted/decrypted in the browser using 256 bits AES.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: RSS-Bridge/rss-bridge
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/RSS-Bridge/rss-bridge
Language: php
The RSS feed for websites missing it

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WordPress/ai
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WordPress/ai
Language: php
AI features and experiments for WordPress. Modular framework for testing AI capabilities.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WordPress/mcp-adapter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WordPress/mcp-adapter
Language: php
An MCP adapter that bridges the Abilities API to the Model Context Protocol, enabling MCP clients to discover and invoke WordPress plugin, theme, and core abilities programmatically.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cedar2025/Xboard
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cedar2025/Xboard
Language: php
High-performance panel based on V2board secondary development supporting new protocols and new features

ns0:entry.ns0:title: composer/composer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/composer/composer
Language: php
Dependency Manager for PHP

ns0:entry.ns0:title: coollabsio/coolify
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/coollabsio/coolify
Language: php
An open-source, self-hostable PaaS alternative to Vercel, Heroku & Netlify that lets you easily deploy static sites, databases, full-stack applications and 280+ one-click services on your own servers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: danielmiessler/SecLists
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/danielmiessler/SecLists
Language: php
SecLists is the security tester's companion. It's a collection of multiple types of lists used during security assessments, collected in one place. List types include usernames, passwords, URLs, sensitive data patterns, fuzzing payloads, web shells, and many more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: filamentphp/filament
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/filamentphp/filament
Language: php
A powerful open-source UI framework for Laravel • Build and ship apps & admin panels fast with Livewire

ns0:entry.ns0:title: glpi-project/glpi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/glpi-project/glpi
Language: php
GLPI is a Free Asset and IT Management Software package, Data center management, ITIL Service Desk, licenses tracking and software auditing.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: grokability/snipe-it
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/grokability/snipe-it
Language: php
A free open source IT asset/license management system

ns0:entry.ns0:title: invoiceninja/invoiceninja
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/invoiceninja/invoiceninja
Language: php

ns0:entry.ns0:title: laravel/ai
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/laravel/ai
Language: php
The Laravel AI SDK provides a unified, expressive API for interacting with AI providers such as OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: laravel/framework
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/laravel/framework
Language: php
Laravel is a web application framework with expressive, elegant syntax.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: matomo-org/matomo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/matomo-org/matomo
Language: php
Empowering People Ethically 🚀 — Matomo is hiring! Join us → https://matomo.org/jobs Matomo is the leading open-source alternative to Google Analytics, giving you complete control and built-in privacy. Easily collect, visualise, and analyse data from websites & apps. Star us on GitHub ⭐️ – Pull Requests welcome!
